content: FlutterVoiceFriend Analysis Complete: 6 patterns identified. ADOPT: session history injection, stop-with-delay, error cascade gate. ADAPT: journaling mode templates, multi-chain summarization, [PAUSE] tag. AVOID: boolean-flag state machine, API keys in .env. Key finding: activity-scoped templates + session history injection for cross-session memory. CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 — ideas only.
